name: Organization of American States
description: A white field bearing the seal of the Organization of American States — a circle containing the flagpoles of the member states surrounding a central design — flanked or below by the names of the founding member states in their official languages.
history: The Organization of American States was founded in 1948 in Bogotá, Colombia. The flag bears the OAS seal, with vertical flagpoles representing the member states.

features.role: Seal of the Organization of American States
